name: Rum Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch with 1 cup of boiling water. Stir until dissolved.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture begins to thicken.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (lemon juice, brandy, nutmeg or cinnamon, light rum, dark rum) while continuing to stir.
4. Simmer for 2 minutes, ensuring all components are well combined.
5. Serve hot over mince pie, pound cake, or pudding.
Makes 3 cups of sauce.
